name: Iso11783IL_PDDOnPDM
title: Iso11783IL_PDDOnPDM
syntax: long Iso11783IL_PDDOnPDM( long command, long parameter, long senderAddress, long pddStatus );
description: The callback method is called from the ISO11783 Interaction Layer if the ISO11783 Interaction Layer receives the Process Data Message parameter group (PDM pg).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: first nibble of the first byte of the received PDM pg; usually represents the received command

parameters.name: parameter
parameters.description: second nibble of the first byte of the received PDM pg

parameters.name: senderAddress
parameters.description: address of the sender of the received PDM pg

parameters.name: pddStatus
parameters.description: current state of the Process Data Dictionary 0: not initialized 1: initialized 2: start up delay (6 seconds) 3: wait for task controller status 4: query information 5: transfer object pool 6: object pool activation 7: online 8: task active

description: The following example is to be used in the environment, where more than one Task Controller is available and determines, that the current node has to communicate with the Task Controller with the address: 246:

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
